notes: No new HPMI-relevant influenza papers found within the 3-day scan window (March 8-11, 2026). Two previously missed papers from outside the window were identified. All 22+ previously catalogued papers re-encountered in web search results.

previously_missed_papers.title: In virio secondary RNA structure analysis of influenza A virus
previously_missed_papers.annotation: Maps RNA secondary structures in IAV packaging signals (NP, PB1). Synonymous mutations in 3 structures within packaging signals attenuate virus replication. Synergistic structural contributions to viral fitness. Relevant to understanding viral replication mechanisms but no direct host-pathogen interactions identified.
previously_missed_papers.reason_missed: Posted Feb 9, outside all previous scan windows; may not have been indexed at time of earlier searches

previously_missed_papers.title: Single-cell heterogeneity in interferon induction potential is heritable and governed by variation in cell state
previously_missed_papers.annotation: IFN induction heterogeneity is heritable and governed by AP-1/JNK pathway. Only a fraction of cells produce type I/III IFNs upon viral stimulation. JNK inhibition alters innate antiviral response independently of JAK/STAT. Relevant to fundamental IFN biology but uses pIC stimulation, not influenza-specific.
previously_missed_papers.reason_missed: v1 from Dec 2025, v2 recently posted; tangentially relevant to HPMI (IFN response heterogeneity)

flagged_updates.title: IFIT3 RNA-binding activity promotes influenza A virus infection and translation efficiency
flagged_updates.status: Now published in Journal of Virology (doi: 10.1128/jvi.00286-25)
flagged_updates.notes: Previously flagged in scan_2026-03-11_c. Pro-viral IFIT3 function via direct RNA binding. v2 on bioRxiv. Formal publication confirms findings.

flagged_updates.title: Snapshot of in-cell protein contact sites reveals new host factors and hijacking of paraspeckles during influenza A virus infection
flagged_updates.status: Still on bioRxiv, no new version detected
flagged_updates.notes: Previously flagged in scan_2026-03-11_c. Comprehensive cross-linking MS interactome, paraspeckle hijacking by IAV.
